title: March 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}
'''March 6''' is the 65th day of the year (66th in leap years). There are 300 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Allen Milgrom]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Gerald Parel]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 106]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Meghan Falcone]] is born.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 10|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 10]] published.
*[[2006]] – The webcomic ''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'' begins.
*[[2009]] – "[[Innocents of Ryloth]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 2|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 2]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Comic 7.3|''Star Wars Comic'' 7.3]] published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[The Final Trial]]'' released.
*2015 – ''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]'' released online.
*2015 – ''[[Lone Wolf: A Tale of Obi-Wan and Luke]]'' released online.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Art Studio]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Expanded Edition]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: A Junior Novel]]'' published.
*2018 – [[The Last Jedi (storybook)|''The Last Jedi'' storybook]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Forces of Destiny: The Rey Chronicles]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[The Last Jedi Read-Along Storybook and CD]]'' published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Insider 179|''Star Wars Insider'' 179]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 62|''Star Wars'' (2015) 62]] published.
*2019 – [[Vader - Dark Visions 1|''Vader - Dark Visions'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Republic - Padmé Amidala 1|''Age of Republic - Padmé Amidala'' 1]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[On the Wings of Keeradaks]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – "[[The Return]]" airs on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Star Wars (2020) 44|''Star Wars'' (2020) 44]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic (2023) 4|''The High Republic'' (2023) 4]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic: Escape from Valo (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Escape from Valo'' audiobook]] released.
*[[2025]] – ''[[The High Republic: Haunted Starlight]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Complete Locations, New Edition]]'' published in the UK.
